revisit_conditions: expanded-slice rerun on NVDA/TSLA/BTC + seed=314 shows any regime where Tier 2 improves CRPS
summary: Making the full 9-method Tier 1+2 pipeline the engine default was evaluated against Tier 1 (SAX+MASS -> DTW+Pearson) on three SPY regimes (bull 2016-2019, COVID 2020, rate-hike 2022). Tier 1+2 ran 37.0x slower than Tier 1 while only 1/3 slices improved CRPS, forward-return correlation dropped from 0.436 to 0.314, and p10/p90 calibration error worsened from 0.05 to 0.175. Verdict: PRELIMINARY DISCARD on the retrieval-bench-v1 slice pack. Engine defaults were NOT changed by this run.
